title: Florida’s attorney general launches criminal probe into ChatGPT over FSU shooting
description: By MIKE SCHNEIDER ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — Florida’s attorney general on Tuesday opened an investigation into OpenAI’s ChatGPT over whether there was criminal behavior involving interactions between the artificial intelligence app and a gunman who killed two people and wounded six others last year at Florida State University. title: Maryland is banning surveillance pricing. What will it change?
description: Surveillance pricing can use artificial intelligence to sift through consumers’ data, such as browsing history, to tailor prices.
content: The Maryland measure places restrictions on food retailers, primarily grocery stores, and third-party delivery services from using surveillance pricing. It also restricts dynamic pricing, requiring grocery stores to keep their prices the same for at ... [2298 chars]

title: Mississippi Law School Requires AI Training as Courts Grapple With the Tech
description: Mississippi College School of Law now mandates artificial intelligence education for first-year students as legal institutions adapt to both the risks and potential uses of the technology.
content:
Mississippi College School of Law now requires all first-year students to complete a course on artificial intelligence, according to a report by Mississippi Today.
